description_long: This bungalow is a modern, single-story residential building with a symmetrical layout, divided into two mirrored units by a central wall. The exterior features a combination of light-colored stone or brickwork on the lower facade and smooth white surfaces above, complemented by dark, flat overhangs on both sides that serve as covered patios or carports. Large, rectangular windows dominate the front and rear facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The roof is a simple gable style, sloping down from the central ridge to the sides, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The structure includes multiple entryways and appears to have a functional, open-plan interior layout. The overall design emphasizes contemporary aesthetics with practical outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a symmetrical, dual-unit layout, light stone facade, large windows, and gable roof. Features covered patios or carports on both sides and a clean, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, large windows, central dividing wall, and covered patios on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, stone wall, and the depth of the covered patio or carport.
description_view_2: Rear view with large windows, central division, and visible outdoor living spaces under the overhangs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the gable roof, stone wall, and covered area.
